_comment: Reference manifest for the App Store scenes. Each scene relaunches the app with `-SCREENSHOT_MODE -SCREENSHOT_SCENE <scene>`, which builds the deterministic state in ScreenshotSupport.swift (onboarding step or a demo weigh-in). The `reading` and `reading_imperial` scenes force metric (kg/cm) and imperial (lb/ft·in) display respectively, in-app, so units are deterministic regardless of the simulator's region. BMI is computed from the canonical metric values and is identical in both. No taps are needed. Scripts/generate-screenshots.sh is the authoritative orchestrator; keep this file in sync with it.

scenes.name: 01_welcome
scenes.title: Your QardioBase, reunited with Apple Health

scenes.name: 02_how_it_works
scenes.title: Direct Bluetooth — no account, no cloud

scenes.name: 03_reading
scenes.title: Step on. Your weight lands in Health (kg).

scenes.name: 04_reading_imperial
scenes.title: Step on. Your weight lands in Health (lb).

scenes.name: 05_privacy
scenes.title: Asks only for what it needs
